query:
ALTER TABLE epi_assinaturas 
ADD COLUMN hash_sha256 VARCHAR(64) NULL AFTER assinaturaUrl,
ADD COLUMN latitude DECIMAL(10, 8) NULL AFTER hash_sha256,
ADD COLUMN longitude DECIMAL(11, 8) NULL AFTER latitude,
ADD COLUMN geoAccuracy DECIMAL(10, 2) NULL AFTER longitude,
ADD COLUMN termoAceito TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 AFTER geoAccuracy,
ADD COLUMN termoTexto TEXT NULL AFTER termoAceito,
ADD COLUMN dispositivoInfo TEXT NULL AFTER termoTexto,
ADD COLUMN integridadeVerificada TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 AFTER dispositivoInfo,
ADD COLUMN verificadoEm TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER integridadeVerificada;
